name: Datadog
description: Query logs, metrics, traces, monitors, dashboards, and security signals
longDescription: Official Datadog MCP server providing structured access to observability data. Query APM traces, logs, metrics, monitors, dashboards, security signals, and more. Supports both OAuth and API key + Application key authentication for headless environments.
author: Datadog

apiKeyConfig.label: Datadog API Key + Application Key
apiKeyConfig.helperText: Create scoped API key and Application key from a service account with minimal permissions

examplePrompts: Show me error logs from the last hour
Get CPU usage metrics for my services
Show security signals for my environment
Get RUM performance data for my app
